nasb.text: Now he gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh a portion among the sons of Judah, according to the command of the Lord to Joshua, namely, Kiriath-arba, Arba being the father of Anak (that is, Hebron).

esv.text: According to the commandment of the Lord to Joshua, he gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh a portion among the people of Judah, Kiriath-arba, that is, Hebron (Arba was the father of Anak).

cnv.text: 約書亞照著耶和華所吩咐的，把猶大人的一份地業，就是基列．亞巴，分給了耶孚尼的兒子迦勒；亞巴是亞衲人的祖先。基列．亞巴就是希伯崙。

ccb.text: 约书亚又照耶和华的吩咐，在犹大支派所分到的土地之中划出基列·亚巴，即希伯仑，分给耶孚尼的儿子迦勒。亚巴是亚衲人的祖先。
